parameters.name: translate_text
parameters.description: Translate text to a target language using DeepL. Parameters: text (the text to translate, required), target_lang (target language code like 'DE', 'EN', 'FR', 'ES', 'IT', 'JA', 'ZH', required), source_lang (source language code, optional — auto-detected if omitted)

value.target_lang: ={{ $fromAI('target_lang', 'Target language code (e.g. DE, EN, FR, ES, IT, JA, ZH)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Target language code (e.g. DE, EN, FR)

parameters.name: detect_language
parameters.description: Detect the language of a given text using DeepL. Parameter: text (the text to analyze, required)

value.text: ={{ $fromAI('text', 'The text to detect the language of', 'string') }}

schema.description: The text to detect the language of
